# =================================================
# STEP 1 — SEW = 8 bits
# =================================================
# LMUL = 1
VINST=00000000000000000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000000000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000000000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# LMUL = 2
VINST=00000000000100000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000000000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000000000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# LMUL = 4
VINST=00000000001000000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000000000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000000000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# LMUL = 8
VINST=00000000001100000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000000000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000000000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# =================================================
# STEP 2 — SEW = 16 bits
# =================================================
# LMUL = 1
VINST=00000000100000000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000101000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000101000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# LMUL = 2
VINST=00000000100100000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000101000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000101000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# LMUL = 4
VINST=00000000101000000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000101000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000101000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# LMUL = 8
VINST=00000000101100000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000101000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000101000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# =================================================
# STEP 3 — SEW = 32 bits
# =================================================
# LMUL = 1
VINST=00000001000000000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

# VLOAD EEW=32
VINST=00000000000000000110000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# VSTORE EEW=32
VINST=00000000000000000110000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# LMUL = 2
VINST=00000001000100000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000110000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000110000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# LMUL = 4
VINST=00000001001000000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000110000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000110000000100111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

# LMUL = 8
VINST=00000001001100000111000001010111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=128

VINST=00000000000000000110000000000111
SCAL2=0
SCAL1=0

VINST=00000000000000000110000000100111
SCAL2=0
